text:
is the 5th chapter of the 1st volume and the 5th chapter overall of the Spoof on Titan manga, written and illustrated by hounori.

Overview

 A skewed view of life around the 104th Training Corps and the people they know. 

Summary

A series of gags in which...

...Bertolt agrees with contradicting opinions about class.

...Carla Yeager shames Eren into helping around the house like Mikasa, only to give him a large load of firewood only Mikasa could carry.

...Sasha puts a kettle on Connie's head to boil water when he gets frustrated.

...Ian Dietrich reminds Rico Brzenska of an embarrassing time when she misplaced her glasses on her own head.

...Mikasa tells Armin how she would like to live in the suburbs with Eren, and that when they get home at the end of the day a servant will have dinner waiting for them.

...Eren follows Reiner's advice to fall asleep by counting Titans, but he instead wakes up transformed into a Titan himself.

...Annie calls a raccoon dog cute, causing Eren to smile as he tells her that it is weird to hear her say that. When Eren points out a cat, Mikasa jumps in and says it is cute, but Eren reacts with shock and horror as he tells Mikasa it is weird to hear her say that.
